zh.lifeSummary: Robert Welles是Thomas Wells和Johanna Barrington的兒子，於1484年8月4日出生。他於1512年與Elizabeth Alice Goodrich在英國英格蘭瓦維其可爾其福德結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1560年7月27日在英國瓦維其可爾斯圖頓享年75歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Robert Welles是Thomas Wells和Johanna Barrington的儿子，于1484年8月4日出生。他于1512年与Elizabeth Alice Goodrich在英国英格兰瓦維其可爾其福德结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1560年7月27日在英国瓦維其可爾斯圖頓享年75岁。

nameMeanings.name: Welles
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Wells
meanings: English: habitational name from Wells next the Sea (Norfolk) or Wells (Somerset), both named with the plural of Old English wella ‘spring, stream’, or a topographic name for someone who lived near a group of springs or streams.
Americanized form (translation into English) of French   Dupuis   ‘from the well’.
History: One of numerous early immigrants from England bearing this name was Thomas Welles, governor of colonial CT, who was in Hartford, CT, by 1636.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

en.lifeSummary: Robert Welles was born on 4 August 1484 as the son of Thomas Wells and Johanna Barrington. He married Elizabeth Alice Goodrich in 1512, in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 1 daughter. He died on 27 July 1560, in Stourton, Warwickshire, England, at the age of 75.

fr.lifeSummary: Robert Welles est né le 4 août 1484, fils de Thomas Wells et Johanna Barrington. Il a épousé Elizabeth Alice Goodrich en 1512, à Whichford, Warwickshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé le 27 juillet 1560, à Stourton, Warwickshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 75 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Robert Welles wurde am 4. August 1484, als Sohn von Thomas Wells und Johanna Barrington geboren. Er hat 1512 in Whichford, Warwickshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Alice Goodrich geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb am 27. Juli 1560 im Alter von 75 Jahren in Stourton, Warwickshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Robert Welles è nato il il 4 agosto 1484 come figlio di Thomas Wells e Johanna Barrington. Lui sposato Elizabeth Alice Goodrich nel 1512, nel Whichford, Warwickshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 27 luglio 1560, nel Stourton, Warwickshire, England, all'età di 75 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Robert Wellesは1484年8月4日にThomas WellsとJohanna Barringtonの息子として生まれた。1512年にイギリスイギリスワーウィクシュアイアウィチフォードでElizabeth Alice Goodrichと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1560年7月27日にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアストウルトンで75歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Robert Welles(은)는 1484년 8월 4일 Thomas Wells(와)과 Johanna Barrington의 아들로 태어났다. 그는 1512년 영국 잉글랜드 워윅실르 위ch퍼드에서 Elizabeth Alice Goodrich(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1560년 7월 27일 영국 워윅실르 스토우르턴에서 75세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.4 August 1484–27 July 1560: 4 de agosto de 1484–27 de julho de 1560
pt.lifeSummary: Robert Welles nasceu em 4 de agosto de 1484 filho de Thomas Wells e Johanna Barrington. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Alice Goodrich em 1512, em Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 27 de julho de 1560, em Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, com 75 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Robert Welles родился 4 августа 1484 г. Его родителей звали Thomas Wells и Johanna Barrington. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Alice Goodrich в 1512 г. в местности уичфорд, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 1 дочь. Он умер 27 июля 1560 г. в местности стоуртон, варвиккшир, Англия в возрасте 75 лет.

es.4 August 1484–27 July 1560: 4 de agosto de 1484–27 de julio de 1560
es.lifeSummary: Robert Welles nació el 4 de agosto de 1484 como hijo de Thomas Wells y Johanna Barrington. Se casó con Elizabeth Alice Goodrich en 1512, en Whichford, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 27 de julio de 1560, en Stourton, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 75 años.
